name: brutalist
description: Raw, unapologetic brutalist web design with heavy borders, harsh contrasts, and zero decorative polish
designMd:
# Design System: Brutalist

## Philosophy
Brutalism rejects decoration. Raw structure is the design. Black borders at 4–8px, pixel-perfect hard shadows (no blur), all-caps headings, yellow highlights as the only non-black non-white color. Inspired by Swiss punk posters and early web zines. Discomfort is intentional.

## Colors
Strict three-color palette:
- **Black**: `#000000` — Borders, text, backgrounds on inverted sections.
- **White**: `#ffffff` — Background, text on black sections.
- **Yellow**: `#ffe000` — The only accent. Used for hover states, highlights, important badges.
- **Red**: `#ff2d00` — Errors and warnings ONLY. Not decorative.

Breaking this palette is only acceptable for semantic states.

## Typography
- **Headings**: **Anton** (or Impact). ALL CAPS. Tight line-height (0.9–1.0). Large — go to 5xl or 6xl. Negative letter-spacing.
- **Body**: **Space Grotesk** for UI labels and body copy. Bold (700).
- **Code/Mono**: **Space Mono**.
- Never center-align body copy. Left-align only.

## Borders
Borders are structural, not decorative. Every interactive element has a `4px solid #000000` border. Cards have `4px` borders. Modals: `6px`. Important CTAs: `8px`.

## Brutal Shadows
Hard offset box shadows with zero blur — these are the core visual device:
- Default card: `4px 4px 0 0 #000000`
- Hover state: shadow shrinks to `2px 2px`, element shifts `2px 2px` to simulate pressing
- Active/pressed: shadow becomes `0 0`, element shifts fully `4px 4px`

This creates a physical button-press illusion with no CSS transitions (use `steps(1)` or `linear` at 80ms).

## Layout
Asymmetric grids are encouraged. Intentional misalignment signals confidence. Use large negative margins for headline overflows. Columns can be 1/3–2/3 splits rather than equal.

## Component Principles
- **Buttons**: Black border, black shadow, white/yellow background. On hover: fill turns yellow, shadow shifts. On active: fully pressed.
- **Cards**: 4px black border, `brutal-md` shadow. Yellow background variant for featured content.
- **Forms**: 2px black border inputs, no border-radius. Label is bold uppercase above field.
- **Navigation**: Fixed top bar. Black background, white text, yellow hover underline (2px solid yellow, not CSS underline).
- **Tables**: All borders visible. Header row: black background, white text. Alternating rows: white/`#f5f5f5`.

## Anti-patterns
- No rounded corners.
- No blurred shadows.
- No gradients.
- No subtle or muted colors besides text muted.
- No thin (1px) borders on interactive elements.
- No smooth easing — snap transitions only.
- No centered or justified text blocks.
